languages.text: {n}Эоганн закрывает глаза Нунциуса. Какое-то время он молча смотрит на тело, после чего подзывает к себе {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}сервочереп{/g} и отдает бинарную команду. Глазница сервочерепа гаснет, а манипуляторы застывают, и техножрец водружает его в подножье сацеллума.{/n} "Теперь я его отпустил окончательно. {name}, спасибо за эту возможность. И спасибо, что были рядом".

traits.locale_text: {n}Эоганн закрывает глаза Нунциуса. Какое-то время он молча смотрит на тело, после чего подзывает к себе {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}сервочереп{/g} и отдает бинарную команду. Глазница сервочерепа гаснет, а манипуляторы застывают, и техножрец водружает его в подножье сацеллума.{/n} "Теперь я его отпустил окончательно. {name}, спасибо за эту возможность. И спасибо, что были рядом".
traits.speaker: EogannCompanion

languages.text: {n}Eogunn closes Nuncius's eyes. He stares at the body in silence for a time, then summons the {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}servo-skull{/g} and issues a command in binharic. The servo-skull's eye socket goes dark and its manipulators freeze, and the Tech-Priest places it at the foot of the sacellum.{/n} "Now I have let him go for good. {name}, thank you for this opportunity. And thank you for being here with me."
languages.original_text: {n}Эоганн закрывает глаза Нунциуса. Какое-то время он молча смотрит на тело, после чего подзывает к себе {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}сервочереп{/g} и отдает бинарную команду. И спасибо, что были рядом".

{n}Eogunn closes Nuncius's eyes. He stares at the body in silence for a time, then summons the servo-skull and issues a command in binharic. The servo-skull's eye socket goes dark and its manipulators freeze, and the Tech-Priest places it at the foot of the sacellum.{/n} "Now I have let him go for good. {name}, thank you for this opportunity. And thank you for being here with me."

languages.text: {n}Eogunn cierra los ojos de Nuncius. Contempla su cuerpo en silencio durante unos instantes, luego llama al {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}servocráneo{/g} y le imparte una orden en binario. El ojo del servocráneo se apaga y sus manipuladores se quedan inmóviles, y el tecnosacerdote lo sitúa a los pies del sacelio.{/n} «Ahora ya descansa al fin. {name}, gracias por brindarme esta oportunidad. Y gracias por estar aquí conmigo».
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn closes Nuncius's eyes. He stares at the body in silence for a time, then summons the {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}servo-skull{/g} and issues a command in binharic. The servo-skull's eye socket goes dark and its manipulators freeze, and the Tech-Priest places it at the foot of the sacellum.{/n} "Now I have let him go for good. {name}, thank you for this opportunity. And thank you for being here with me."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn cierra los ojos de Nuncius. Contempla su cuerpo en silencio durante unos instantes, luego llama al {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}servocráneo{/g} y le imparte una orden en binario. El ojo del servocráneo se apaga y sus manipuladores se quedan inmóviles, y el tecnosacerdote lo sitúa a los pies del sacelio.{/n} «Ahora ya descansa al fin. {name}, gracias por brindarme esta oportunidad. Y gracias por estar aquí conmigo».

languages.text: {n}伊奥贡合上努恩修斯的双眼。他静静地盯着尸体看了一会儿，随后召来{g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}伺服头骨{/g}，用二进制发出一道指令。伺服头骨的眼窝暗了下去，机械臂也僵住了，这位技术神甫把它放在了神龛的脚下。{/n}“现在，我终于彻底放他走了。{name}，谢谢您给我这个机会，也谢谢您在这里陪着我。”
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn closes Nuncius's eyes. He stares at the body in silence for a time, then summons the {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}servo-skull{/g} and issues a command in binharic. The servo-skull's eye socket goes dark and its manipulators freeze, and the Tech-Priest places it at the foot of the sacellum.{/n} "Now I have let him go for good. {name}, thank you for this opportunity. And thank you for being here with me."

traits.locale_text: {n}伊奥贡合上努恩修斯的双眼。他静静地盯着尸体看了一会儿，随后召来{g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}伺服头骨{/g}，用二进制发出一道指令。伺服头骨的眼窝暗了下去，机械臂也僵住了，这位技术神甫把它放在了神龛的脚下。{/n}“现在，我终于彻底放他走了。{name}，谢谢您给我这个机会，也谢谢您在这里陪着我。”

languages.text: {n}Eogunn ferme les yeux de Nuncius. Il regarde son ami en silence pendant quelque temps, avant d'appeler le {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}servocrâne{/g} pour lui donner un ordre en binhaire. L'orbite du crâne s'assombrit et ses manipulateurs s'immobilisent, puis le technoprêtre le pose au pied du sacellum.{/n} « Maintenant, je l'ai laissé partir pour de bon. {name}, je vous remercie de m'avoir donné cette chance et d'être {mf|resté|restée} à mes côtés. »
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn closes Nuncius's eyes. He stares at the body in silence for a time, then summons the {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}servo-skull{/g} and issues a command in binharic. The servo-skull's eye socket goes dark and its manipulators freeze, and the Tech-Priest places it at the foot of the sacellum.{/n} "Now I have let him go for good. {name}, thank you for this opportunity. And thank you for being here with me."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn ferme les yeux de Nuncius. Il regarde son ami en silence pendant quelque temps, avant d'appeler le {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}servocrâne{/g} pour lui donner un ordre en binhaire. L'orbite du crâne s'assombrit et ses manipulateurs s'immobilisent, puis le technoprêtre le pose au pied du sacellum.{/n} « Maintenant, je l'ai laissé partir pour de bon. {name}, je vous remercie de m'avoir donné cette chance et d'être {mf|resté|restée} à mes côtés. »

languages.text: {n}Eogunn, Nuncius'un gözlerini kapatıyor. Bir süre bedene sessizce bakıyor, sonra {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}hizmeleti{/g} çağırıp ikilidil bir komut veriyor. Hizmeletin göz çukuru kararıyor ve manipülatörleri donuyor, ardından Tekno Rahip onu şapelin dibine yerleştiriyor.{/n} "Onu sonsuza dek özgür bıraktım. {name}, bu fırsat için teşekkür ederim. Burada benimle olduğunuz için de."
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn closes Nuncius's eyes. He stares at the body in silence for a time, then summons the {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}servo-skull{/g} and issues a command in binharic. The servo-skull's eye socket goes dark and its manipulators freeze, and the Tech-Priest places it at the foot of the sacellum.{/n} "Now I have let him go for good. {name}, thank you for this opportunity. And thank you for being here with me."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn, Nuncius'un gözlerini kapatıyor. Bir süre bedene sessizce bakıyor, sonra {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}hizmeleti{/g} çağırıp ikilidil bir komut veriyor. Hizmeletin göz çukuru kararıyor ve manipülatörleri donuyor, ardından Tekno Rahip onu şapelin dibine yerleştiriyor.{/n} "Onu sonsuza dek özgür bıraktım. {name}, bu fırsat için teşekkür ederim. Burada benimle olduğunuz için de."

languages.text: {n}Eogunn schließt Nuncius' Augen. Er betrachtet eine Weile schweigend den Leichnam, ehe er einen {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}Servoschädel{/g} ruft und ihm auf Binhärisch einen Befehl erteilt. Die Augenhöhle des Servoschädels erlischt, seine Manipulatoren erstarren und der Techpriester legt ihn vor das Sacellum.{/n} "Nun habe ich ihn gehen lassen. Danke für diese Gelegenheit, {name}. Und danke, dass Ihr hier bei mir seid."
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn closes Nuncius's eyes. He stares at the body in silence for a time, then summons the {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}servo-skull{/g} and issues a command in binharic. The servo-skull's eye socket goes dark and its manipulators freeze, and the Tech-Priest places it at the foot of the sacellum.{/n} "Now I have let him go for good. {name}, thank you for this opportunity. And thank you for being here with me."

Er betrachtet eine Weile schweigend den Leichnam, ehe er einen {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}Servoschädel{/g} ruft und ihm auf Binhärisch einen Befehl erteilt. Die Augenhöhle des Servoschädels erlischt, seine Manipulatoren erstarren und der Techpriester legt ihn vor das Sacellum.{/n} "Nun habe ich ihn gehen lassen. Danke für diese Gelegenheit, {name}. Und danke, dass Ihr hier bei mir seid."

languages.text: {n}エオガンはヌンキウスの目を閉じてやる。しばらく無言で亡骸を見つめたのち、{g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}サーヴォスカル{/g}を呼び寄せ、バイナリックで命令を下す。サーヴォスカルの眼窩が暗転し、そのマニピュレーターが動きを止めると、技術司祭はそれを聖龕の足元に安置する。{/n}「これで、私は彼を永久に逝かせました。{name}、この機会を与えてくれたこと、感謝します。そして、ここで私と共にいてくれたことも」
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn closes Nuncius's eyes. He stares at the body in silence for a time, then summons the {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}servo-skull{/g} and issues a command in binharic. The servo-skull's eye socket goes dark and its manipulators freeze, and the Tech-Priest places it at the foot of the sacellum.{/n} "Now I have let him go for good. {name}, thank you for this opportunity. And thank you for being here with me."
